# veeam_repository (Resource)

Manages a Veeam backup repository (WinLocal, LinuxLocal, Nfs, Smb).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Repository name.
- `type` (String) Repository type: `WinLocal`, `LinuxLocal`, `Nfs`, or `Smb`.

### Optional

- `credentials_id` (String) Credential ID for SMB share access.
- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `host_id` (String) Managed server host ID (WinLocal and LinuxLocal types).
- `max_task_count` (Number) Maximum concurrent tasks.
- `path` (String) Folder path on the host (WinLocal / LinuxLocal).
- `share_path` (String) Network share path (Nfs or Smb types).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Repository identifier (assigned by the server).
